title: FTBChunks - Gristlayer Overlay
description:
Adds a Gristlayer Overlay from Minestuck to FTBChunks

REQUIRES MINESTUCK, FTB CHUNKS AND ALL THEIR DEPENDENCIES .
body:
Custom addon mod that adds a custom overlay for FTB Chunks, featuring "Grist Layers" from the mod minestuck. Grist Layers are areas of the map, similiar but not entirely working like Slime Chunks that determine which type of imps can be spawned on a block position. A transparency option is given in FTB Chunks Configs.

**This mod is required on the server and client, due to requesting Grist Layer information from the server.**

Beware, this mod adds a WrapOperation mixin on FTBChunks pixel renderer function, should not have compatibility issues with other mods as long as they know what they're doing, however be wary of using other mods with similiar style since support for custom overlays is not inherent in FTBChunks mod.
